metadata.description: 145+ AI-powered business skills for Claude — audience research, offer optimisation, sales, analytics, operations, HR, legal, and more.

plugins.name: futureproof
plugins.description: FutureProof MCP connector — registers the persistent memory and context server. Install this first, then add any skill families.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create content, plan campaigns, and grow your audience. Covers copywriting, social media, email, advertising, and brand thought leadership — all personalised to your ICA and brand voice.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Close more deals and build trust at scale. Sales scripts, conversion sequences, objection handling, pipeline forecasting, and social proof — built around your ICA and offer.

plugins.name: audience-research
plugins.description: Understand your market at depth. ICA profiling, belief mapping, demand detection, competitor analysis, and trend forecasting — so every campaign starts with insight.

plugins.name: analytics-data
plugins.description: Turn numbers into decisions. Campaign debriefs, revenue attribution, conversion optimisation, KPI interpretation, and Google Analytics reporting — with FutureProof context built in.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Run a tighter business. SOPs, proposals, client onboarding, meeting prep, project briefs, compliance checks, and process improvement — all documented and repeatable.

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Stay on top of the numbers. Cash flow modelling, P&L analysis, budget planning, invoice generation, and financial reporting — built for service business owners.

plugins.name: hr-people
plugins.description: Hire well, develop your team, and build culture. Job ads, interview questions, performance reviews, handbooks, and DISC interpretation — tailored to your business.

plugins.name: customer-success
plugins.description: Keep customers longer and turn them into advocates. Onboarding sequences, churn detection, referral programmes, complaint handling, and NPS analysis.

plugins.name: strategy
plugins.description: Make better decisions faster. Offer diagnostics, positioning, pricing, launch planning, pivot analysis, pre-mortems, and founder-level strategic advisory — with your full business context.

plugins.name: communications-pr
plugins.description: Communicate with clarity and confidence. Press releases, crisis comms, internal memos, newsletters, podcast notes, and event scripts — on brand, every time.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Protect your business. NDAs, terms and conditions, privacy policies, and contract review — plain-language drafts built for small business owners.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Build and improve products faster. Feature prioritisation, roadmap planning, competitive analysis, and beta testing — grounded in your user context.
